context.goal: Insert a checkbox form field next to the first numbered item.
context.cues: Forms ribbon is active with form field buttons visible; the page contains numbered items '1.' and '2.' near the upper-left area.

state_anchor.locator: Forms tab highlighted on the top ribbon

anchors.locator: Forms ribbon button labeled 'Checkbox' with a checkmark icon
blank insertion area immediately after numbered item '1.' on the page

procedure.expect: Checkbox insertion tool is selected or ready; hovering shows the checkbox tool context/tooltip.
A small checkbox form field appears inline after '1.', and the text cursor moves to the second numbered line.
